name: Hearty Oat and Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Oats -- quick or old fashion
2 Egg Beaters. 99% Egg Substitute -- or substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 425°F.
2. Spray an 8 or 9-inch square baking pan with nonstick spray.
3. In a medium bowl, combine dry ingredients: oats, cornmeal, flour, baking powder, salt (if using), and onion.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (milk, corn kernels, applesauce, and egg beaters) to the dry mixture. Mix well until just combined.
5. Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
7. Serve warm.
